application.doc: Delete a specific remote syslog forwarding policy

param.name: id
param.doc: Unique id of the object to delete

method.name: DELETE
method.id: Delete a specific remote syslog forwarding policy
method.doc: Delete a specific remote syslog forwarding policy

param.name: Accept:application/json
param.doc: Required for requests to the service

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting Response is in JSON formatting

response.doc: There is a problem with the request. The JSON message describes the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting Response is in JSON formatting

response.doc: An internal error occurred. The JSON message indicates the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting Response is in JSON formatting
